---
title: "No Association Between Regional Unemployment Rate and Diabetes Prevalence in Japan: A Prefecture-Level Ecological Study Using the National Database of Health Insurance Claims"
license: "CC BY 4.0"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    embed-resources: true
  docx:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
bibliography: ../references.bib
csl: ../vancouver.csl
---

{{< include ../includes/preprint_disclaimer.qmd >}}

{{< include ../core/manuscript_core.qmd >}}

{{< include ../includes/data_transparency.qmd >}}
